name: golang-github-envoyproxy-protoc-gen-validate-dev
title: golang-github-envoyproxy-protoc-gen-validate-dev
summary: protocol buffer semantic validation generator for Go
description:
protocol buffer semantic validation generator for Go
While protocol buffers effectively guarantee the types of structured data,
they cannot enforce semantic rules for values. This package provides a
protoc plugin and Go library that adds support for validating constraints
expressed as annotations within the protobuf schema.
.
By generating "Validate" methods for the message types, it allows
applications to enforce complex rules—such as string patterns, numerical
ranges, and required fields—at the edge of the service. This ensures that
only valid data enters the system, reducing the need for manual validation
logic and improving the reliability of distributed systems.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-envoyproxy-protoc-gen-validate-dev because protocol buffer semantic validation generator for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-envoyproxy-protoc-gen-validate-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-envoyproxy-protoc-gen-validate-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-envoyproxy-protoc-gen-validate-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
